steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a 1920x1080 HTML/CSS slide according to the specifications, then verify it by rendering to PNG.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>UI Design: Before vs After</title>
    <style>

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to verify the slide by rendering it to a PNG and examining the result. Let me use Playwright to render the slide to a 1920x1080 PNG.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll examine the rendered PNG to verify if the slide meets all the requirements.

I can see that the slide has been rendered, but there are several issues that need to be fixed:

1. The title "UI Design: Before vs After" is not in 28px bold as specified
2. The columns don't appear to be exactly 930px wide with a 60px gap between them
3. The "Before" mock doesn't show low-contrast text (#6b7280 on #d1d5db) as required
4. The "After" mock doesn't clearly show the specified design

    <title>UI Design: Before vs After</title>
    <style>
